name: Dheeraj Jha
bio: Founder of CppIndia and passionate C++ developer. Started the community to create a welcoming space for C++ developers across India.

name: Ankur M Satle
bio: Founder member and the most frequent speaker at CppIndia. Keynote at CppIndiaCon 2024. Deep expertise in modern C++ design patterns and value-oriented programming.

name: Mahendra Garodi
bio: Passion for performance engineering, SIMD, and modern C++ features. Spoke at CppIndiaCon 2024 on Undefined Behaviour. A regular contributor to CppIndia's tech talks.

name: Kashish Nagpal
bio: Community moderator and speaker who helped shape CppIndia's inclusive culture. Known for talks on C++20 Concepts and developer tooling.

name: Niket Kumar
bio: Community moderator and C++ enthusiast, passionate about bringing together developers and fostering knowledge sharing within the CppIndia community.

name: Bjarne Stroustrup
bio: The creator of C++. Managing Director in the Technology Division at Morgan Stanley and Visiting Professor at Columbia University. Honoured CppIndia with an AMA session at the inaugural CppIndiaCon 2021.

name: Bryce Adelstein Lelbach
bio: CUDA C++ Core Libraries lead at NVIDIA and chair of the ISO C++ library evolution working group. Spoke at CppIndiaCon 2021 and 2023, and hosted a community AMA.

name: Jon Kalb
bio: Chair of CppCon — the world's largest annual C++ conference. Gave the keynote 'C++ Today: The Beast is Back' at the inaugural CppIndiaCon 2021.

name: Matt Godbolt
bio: Creator of Compiler Explorer (godbolt.org), the interactive compiler tool used by millions of C++ developers worldwide. Spoke on 'Cool Compiler Tidbits' in 2021.

name: Alex Dathskovsky
bio: C++ expert specialising in high-performance and C++/Python interoperability. Delivered the keynote 'C++ ♥ Python' at CppIndiaCon 2024.

name: Jonathan Müller
bio: C++ developer, blogger, and creator of several open-source C++ libraries including lexy (parser combinator). Spoke at CppIndiaCon in both 2023 and 2024.

name: Mike Shah
bio: Associate Teaching Professor at Northeastern University, game developer, and prolific C++ educator on YouTube. Presented at CppIndiaCon in both 2023 and 2024.

name: Andreas Fertig
bio: C++ trainer, author, and creator of C++ Insights — a tool that shows what the compiler generates from your code. Spoke on 'C++ Coroutines from Scratch' at CppIndiaCon 2023.

name: Selvakumar Jawahar
bio: C++ developer specialising in concurrency patterns and 5G open-source software. One of the most frequent external contributors, speaking at both CppIndiaCon editions and community tech talks.

name: Šimon Tóth
bio: C++ author and educator, known for writing accessible content on modern C++ ranges, concepts, and language features. Spoke on 'What is a range?' at CppIndiaCon 2024.

name: Pavithra Ashok Kumar
bio: Systems developer with deep expertise in debugging. Presented 'Art of Debugging' at CppIndiaCon 2024, covering systematic approaches and debugging legacy codebases.

name: John Stratton
bio: CTO of MulticoreWare, creators of x265 and x266 video codecs. Spoke on 'Software Design and Performance in C++' at CppIndiaCon 2024.

name: Inbal Levi
bio: ISO C++ committee member and C++ developer at Meta. Spoke on 'Customization Methods: Connecting User and Library Code' at CppIndiaCon 2022.

name: Dr. Greg Law
bio: CEO of Undo and debugging expert. Creator of record-and-replay debugging for Linux. Spoke on 'Getting the Most Out of GDB' at CppIndiaCon 2022.

name: Kiran Kannappan
bio: Intel software developer and heterogeneous computing advocate. Spoke on 'Introduction to Intel oneAPI' at CppIndiaCon 2023.

name: Kushashwa Ravi Shrimali
bio: OpenCV contributor and AI/ML practitioner with deep C++ expertise. Spoke on 'Using C++ for Your Artificial Intelligence Solution' at CppIndiaCon 2023.

name: Venkata Naga Ravikiran Bulusu
bio: C++ developer specialising in concurrent programming patterns. Spoke on 'Understanding Common Concurrency Patterns with Tricky Examples' at CppIndiaCon 2023.

name: Harishankar Singh
bio: C++ developer with focus on modern language features. Spoke on C++20 Ranges at CppIndiaCon 2021 and presented SOLID Principles in a community tech talk.

name: Saurabh Joshi
bio: Researcher and C++ practitioner focused on formal methods and contract programming. Spoke on 'Contract Programming: What, Why, and How?' at CppIndiaCon 2021.

name: Vishal Chovatiya
bio: C++ blogger and practitioner known for accessible articles on modern C++. One of the earliest CppIndia speakers — three talks spanning 2020 and 2021.

name: Shilpa Dodeja
bio: One of the founding speakers of CppIndia, contributing three talks in 2020 covering smart pointers and lambda expressions — core topics that helped establish the community's technical depth.

name: Kunal Sharma
bio: Build systems and package management expert. Delivered a two-part series on dependency management using CMake and Conan across 2020 and 2021.

name: Tsung-Wei Huang
bio: Creator of Taskflow, a modern C++ parallel programming library. Associate Professor at University of Wisconsin-Madison. Spoke on parallel programming at one of CppIndia's earliest tech talks.

name: Slobodan Dmitrovic
bio: Author of 'Modern C++ for Absolute Beginners'. Spoke on learning strategies for C++ at a CppIndia tech talk in 2022.

name: Sebastian Theophil
bio: C++ developer at think-cell, Berlin. Spoke on cross-platform development lessons from shipping C++ software on Windows, macOS, and the Web.

name: John McFarlane
bio: C++ numerics specialist and author of fixed-point arithmetic proposals for the ISO C++ standard. Spoke on 'The Secret Life of Numbers' in 2022.

name: Ivica Bogosavljević
bio: Performance engineering expert. Spoke on 'The Performance Price of Virtual Functions in C++' — one of the most popular early 2022 tech talks.

name: Nikunj Gupta
bio: HPX contributor and parallel computing researcher. Introduced the CppIndia community to HPX, a C++ standard library for concurrency and parallelism.

name: Guy Davidson
bio: C++ developer at Adobe and ISO C++ committee contributor. Spoke on memory management and file I/O in C++ at a 2021 CppIndia session.

name: Honey Sukesan
bio: C++ developer and educator. Delivered a talk on SOLID principles in C++ in early 2022.

name: Oliver Esser
bio: C++ developer specialising in asynchronous programming. Spoke on 'Async in C++' in early 2022.

name: Ratnesh Tiwari
bio: Compiler internals enthusiast. Co-presented 'C++, A Compiler's Perspective' alongside Darshan Bhat in November 2022.

name: Darshan Bhat
bio: Compiler and toolchain developer. Spoke on 'C++, A Compiler's Perspective' in October 2022.

name: Sabariesh Ganesan
bio: Automotive software engineer with expertise in secure C++ practices. Spoke on safety and security in automotive-grade C++ software in December 2021.

name: Karan Banthia
bio: Embedded systems developer and C++ practitioner. Spoke on 'Modern C++ Design Patterns for Embedded Firmware' in February 2024.

name: Shivam Prasad
bio: C++ developer who shared practical tips and tools for C++ development as part of the CppIndia N-Lighting Talks in May 2022.
